sentiment.reasoning: A 20% margin improvement indicates strong operational efficiency and immediate profitability gains.

headlines.headline: Orevov Solutions recalls products in automated logistics line due to quality concerns

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
